title: Turn Notes to Tasks in Seconds? See How!
excerpt: I’m super excited about the potential to enhance my experience with the Monday.com iPhone app! Imagine being able to instantly transform your handwritten notes from a post-it or notebook into tasks with just a photo snap…

posts.author: Adrian (Adrian F. Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m super excited about the potential to enhance my experience with the Monday.com iPhone app! Imagine being able to instantly transform your handwritten notes from a post-it or notebook into tasks with just a photo snap. The current feature allows adding notes one by one, but what if we could elevate this process? Picture leveraging text recognition to capture all the text from your photo and then employing AI to not only refine the text for clarity and impact but also intelligently suggest whether it should be a single task or split into multiple tasks. This would revolutionize the way we convert quick, handwritten notes into organized tasks, especially in dynamic settings where notes are frequently shared and passed around. The prospect of this feature is truly exciting and would be a game-changer for efficient task management on the go!
